positive: A vibrant, celestial mandala composition featuring interconnected geometric patterns and stylized cosmic elements. The central subject is a luminous, spiraling nebula set against a deep indigo and cosmic teal background. Surrounding the nebula are minimalist line art motifs of crescent moons, constellations, stylized planets (Jupiter, Saturn), and flowing etheric ribbons, designed to create an intricate, symmetrical, and modern tapestry. Use a flat graphic design aesthetic with gradients, strong outlines, and pops of glowing gold and electric magenta. The composition must be highly centered, repeating elements should maintain clean, wearable silhouettes suitable for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, ethereal glowing effect, vector graphic style, mystical, transcendental.
negative: text, words, logo, watermark, signature, writing, blurry, noisy, distorted, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, amateur, grain, artifact, deep shadows, realism, photography, photo-realistic
